title: JavaScript Numbers Quiz
description: Evaluate your understanding of integers, floats, NaN, and built-in Number methods in JavaScript.

questions.question: What is the return type of a number literal with decimals (e.g., 5.5) in JavaScript?
Which of the following results in Infinity?
Which method should you use to return a string written with 2 decimals?
How do you represent a BigInt in JavaScript?
options: Appending an 'n' to the end of a whole number (e.g., 5n)
